title_en: GRAS Loophole: America's Hidden Food Safety Secret
title_es: GRAS: El Secreto Oculto de Seguridad Alimentaria en EE.UU.
hook_en: Did you know companies can bypass the FDA for food safety? 🤯
hook_es: ¿Sabías que las empresas pueden esquivar al FDA para la seguridad alimentaria? 🤯
key_message: The GRAS loophole allows companies to self-certify food additives as safe without FDA review, potentially compromising public health.
_source_regulation_context:
KEY REGULATORY EVENTS:
  • 1958: Food Additives Amendment — GRAS loophole created — Impact: Companies can self-certify ingredients as safe WITHOUT FDA review

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_en: From Safe to Unsafe: Banned Additives in Your Food
title_es: De Seguro a Peligroso: Aditivos Prohibidos en Tu Comida
hook_en: Why are banned additives still in your food? 😱
hook_es: ¿Por qué aditivos prohibidos siguen en tu comida? 😱
key_message: US regulations allow certain additives banned in other countries, putting consumers at risk and contributing to rising obesity rates.
_source_regulation_context:
KEY REGULATORY EVENTS:
  • 1958: Food Additives Amendment — GRAS loophole created — Impact: Companies can self-certify ingredients as safe WITHOUT FDA review
